title: alyssum niveum
intro: Alyssum niveum, also known as white alyssum, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Alyssum niveum include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and soothe respiratory problems. Alyssum niveum can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
